component.name: PiLauncher
component.summary: 专为手柄设计的 Minecraft 启动器

description.p: PiLauncher 是一款为游戏手柄和掌机量身定制的 Minecraft 启动器。它拥有为主机式体验优化的全屏用户界面，让你可以轻松地使用手柄管理、配置和运行你的 Minecraft 游戏实例。

PiLauncher is a Minecraft launcher tailored for gamepads and handheld consoles. It features a full-screen, console-like user interface optimized for controller inputs, allowing you to easily manage and launch your Minecraft instances.

ul.li: 完全支持手柄操作，提供沉浸式大屏体验。
Full gamepad support for an immersive large-screen experience.
自动识别和配置手柄相关模组。
Automatic detection and configuration of gamepad-related mods.
极简且现代化的实例和模组管理。
Minimalist and modern instance and mod management.

description.p: 「皮肤中心」功能增强与 Linux 体验优化

ul.li: [新功能] 完善「皮肤中心」国际化支持，实现中英双语即时切换。
[新功能] 新增皮肤备注功能，支持为不同皮肤存储个性化说明并持久化保存。
[优化] 提升「皮肤中心」视觉交互，添加“使用中”金色标记，并优化卡片色彩表现。
[修复] 解决 Linux 平台下 UI 列表滚动可能出现的闪烁同步问题。
[修复] 修正 Linux 构建工作流配置，补充缺失的 libudev 系统库依赖。

description.p: Wardrobe Enhancements and Linux UX Optimizations

ul.li: [New] Full i18n support for the Wardrobe feature with localized UI strings.
[New] Added skin remarks/notes support with persistent local storage.
[Optimization] Enhanced Wardrobe UI with "In Use" status badges and refined card vibrancy.
[Fix] Resolved UI flickering issues during list scrolling on Linux systems.
[Fix] Fixed Linux build failures by adding the libudev-dev system dependency.
